allow: PowerShell(Start-Process "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host "Docker Desktop起動試行完了")

hooks.command: $gh = 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $runId = ((& $gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId | ConvertFrom-Json)[0].databaseId); if (-not $runId) { exit 0 }; & $gh run watch $runId --exit-status 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $logs = (& $gh run view $runId --log-failed 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 80 | Out-String); Write-Output "GitHub Actions failed (run #$runId):`n$logs"; exit 2 }; exit 0

$gh = 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $runId = ((& $gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId | ConvertFrom-Json)[0].databaseId); if (-not $runId) { exit 0 }; & $gh run watch $runId --exit-status 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $logs = (& $gh run view $runId --log-failed 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 80 | Out-String); Write-Output "GitHub Actions failed (run #$runId):`n$logs"; exit 2 }; exit 0

$json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = [string]$json.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match 'backend' -and $f -match '(models|views|serializers)\.py$') { try { Set-Location 'C:\Users\ymats\NeON-Church\frontend'; npm run gen:types } catch {} }; exit 0
